column1: Ildemaro Vargas stands out as the top pick, recording a hit in every game this season with a strong recent pace and a favorable platoon edge against Colin Rea. Juan Soto also brings reliability near the top of the order, benefiting from a platoon advantage and steady hit rates. Ozzie Albies offers additional appeal with a favorable park boost and solid consistency, while others on the slate trail slightly in both matchup and recent performance.
